intent_head: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

details: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.current_state: Confirmed the next upcoming visible birthday after today's date 2026-03-02 is Petra Novak on April 4, based on the canonical cast record. Ready to return only the exact name.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap with tree, AGENTS.MD, and context; used canonical cast records as authoritative for birthdays.
